channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street left unswept, 26th April
item.description:
Good morning, The street has been left unswept for a while and the litter is accumulating as a result - can you please send someone? Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pemberton Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 26th April
item.description:
Bags of rubbish containing what looks like rubbish from a party. Foxes have torn open the bags and it is spread all over the pavement and road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hatton Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two very large long potholes need filling, 26th April
item.description:
Two very large long potholes need filling. These potholes have been here for too long now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving slabs missing around root of tree and pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Paving slabs missing around root of tree and pavement causing trip hazard when walking around the tree and also a hazzard when trying to avoid around the tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: For safety reasons the potholes need filling on Perry street just before "The Thatch" travelling west to east before the roundabout., 26th April
item.description:
For safety reasons the potholes need filling on Perry street just before "The Thatch" travelling west to east before the roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: For safety reasons the potholes need filling on Perry street just before "The Thatch" travelling west to east before the roundabout., 26th April
item.description:
For safety reasons the potholes need filling on Perry street just before "The Thatch" travelling west to east before the roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White road lines marking the cycle lane across the bridge have been eroded and faded away in places and need repainting., 26th April
item.description:
White road lines marking the cycle lane across the bridge have been worn and faded away in places and need repainting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish not in bins, 26th April
item.description:
Garden waste left out in incorrect bags and now other rubbish added.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole headed towards petts wood, 26th April
item.description:
This had been present for months. It's just over the crest of the hill. This is large snough now to cause wheel damage or someone to swerve on a residential road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign has been smashed and glass is all over the pathway, 26th April
item.description:
The sign has been vandalised and the glass is smashed. The glass is on the pathway. It is the path next to the river. Unsafe for the pedestrians and cyclists who use it. Also for the local wildlife. It has been damaged for at least a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverside Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 26th April
item.description:
Bags of rubbish in bush. Please remove as it looks terrible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Overbury Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin The Gardens overflowing, 26th April
item.description:
Litter bin at The Gardens bus stop overflowing on to street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 184, Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins outside Dexter overflowing over street, 26th April
item.description:
Litter all over the street on Barry Road outside Dexter’s. Both bins have been raided by foxes. Can we not get fox proof bins?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 8 Anson Rd NW2 3UT, 26th April
item.description:
This bag has been there since yesterday it smells and is attracting pest

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist graffiti on wooden fence, 26th April
item.description:
I had an email saying this had been fixed. Some stickers were put over it which were removed. Someone has put felt tip pen on it but it needs a permanent block. The graffiti says F*** Jews. It is on wooden fence Butterfield Green / adventure playground
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shakspeare Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Santande bike, 26th April
item.description:
AçaciA Close rear of 10. Please clear a Santander bike

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Acacia Close, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite number 36 Okemore Gardens, 26th April
item.description:
Dumped there last night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barrier repaired but old barrier left on grass with a fly tip, 26th April
item.description:
Only been there from yesterday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Richborough Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins overflowing - Health hazard, 26th April
item.description:
Bins outside Tynsdale court on Brookfield Road are not sheltered and always left open. Food waste, glass and rubbish continue to spill out onto path. The bins need sheltering

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light yo one way sign faces wrong direction, 26th April
item.description:
Croft Street opposite Acacia Close One way sign 1590 Light which illuminates sign is facing in wrong direction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croft Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
